zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Corbet於大約1233年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾時，他的父親William de Corbet45歲，母親Ada35歲。他於大約1263年與Nesta Vale在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年在法國利姆辛可雷拉 貝東尼享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Corbet was born about 1233, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Corbet, was 45 and his mother, Ada, was 35. He married Nesta Vale about 1263, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1289, in La Bertonie, Corrèze, Limousin, France, at the age of 57.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Corbetが約1233年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Corbetは45歳，母Adaは35歳であった。約1263年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでNesta Valeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年にフランスリモウシンコルeズラ バートニーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Corbet(이)가 대략 1233년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Corbet(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1263년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Nesta Vale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 프랑스 리모우신 코e즈 라 버토니에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Nesta Vale около 1263 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1289 г. в местности ла биртони, коррeз, лимусин, Франция в возрасте 57 лет.
